isolation.boundary: Stayed on localhost:5180 only, used one browser session, and used one local account created via /signup.

steps.action: Sign up via /signup with redirect back to /studies/demo-study/overview and let the app navigate to the study overview.
steps.observed: The app redirected to http://localhost:5180/studies/demo-study/overview after signup in the same browser session.

steps.action: Inspect the overview page status and progress surfaces.
steps.expected: Study detail shows a study status badge plus progress and run summary information.
steps.observed: The overview page showed the study status badge `completed`, `100% complete`, `2 of 2 runs reached a terminal outcome`, `Completed 2 / 2`, `Running 0`, and `Queued / dispatching 0`.

steps.action: Open /studies/demo-study/runs and inspect the run list plus the initially selected run detail.
steps.expected: Run cards show statuses and the selected run shows milestone timeline entries with step index, action type, and URL.
steps.observed: The runs page listed two run cards with status badges `hard fail` (Careful shopper) and `soft fail` (Busy parent). The selected Careful shopper detail showed milestone timeline entries `Step 1: Cart` → `Action click` → `URL https://example.com/checkout/cart` and `Step 2: Address` → `Action type` → `URL https://example.com/checkout/address`.

steps.action: Select the `Busy parent` run card and inspect the updated run detail.
steps.expected: Run detail updates to the chosen run and still shows milestone timeline fields.
steps.observed: The detail panel updated to `soft fail` for Busy parent and showed `Step 1: Address` → `Action click` → `URL https://example.com/checkout/address` and `Step 2: Payment` → `Action wait` → `URL https://example.com/checkout/payment`.

evidence.consoleErrors: none on the overview or runs pages
evidence.network: Same-origin fetch GET /studies/demo-study/overview -> 200; same-origin fetch GET /studies/demo-study/runs?runId=run-demo-payment -> 200; agent-browser request log also captured POST https://tame-lark-825.eu-west-1.convex.cloud/api/action during page load.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. The study overview showed a `completed` badge with `100% complete` progress, and the runs page showed `hard fail` and `soft fail` badges with milestone timelines that included step index, action type, and URL values.
